rows.claim_boundary: Translation/rotation DOF block Schur FGMRES is a physics-aware ROCm sparse preconditioner. It uses sparse subblock matvecs and Jacobi approximate triangular block solves on the ROCm torch device. Optional Schur-basis correction projects the preconditioner residual through a small algebraic basis and can only promote closure when full assembled CSR residual replay meets the G9 gate.
